# Pasta Carbonara

Classic Italian pasta dish. Ready in 30 minutes. Serves 4.

## Ingredients

- 400g spaghetti
- 200g guanciale
- 4 egg yolks
- 100g Pecorino Romano
- Black pepper to taste

## Steps

1. Boil pasta in salted water until al dente
2. Cut guanciale into small cubes and fry until crispy
3. Mix egg yolks with grated Pecorino and pepper
4. Drain pasta, reserve 1 cup of pasta water
5. Toss hot pasta with guanciale, then add egg mixture off heat
6. Add pasta water gradually until creamy

## Notes

- Never use cream -- real carbonara has no cream
- Guanciale can be substituted with pancetta
- Use the starchy pasta water to achieve the right consistency
